Google Docs est un service de traitement de texte en ligne. Il permet de créer des documents, de les mettre en forme et de les modifier en collaboration avec d'autres personnes. Go to Drive. Click New File Upload. Choose the file you want to import from your computer to add it to Drive. In the Upload complete window, click Show file location . Right-click the file and select Open with Google Docs/Sheets/Slides. Write something new with Gemini in Google Docs. On your computer, open a document on Google Docs. In the document, click where you want to write. On the left, click Help me write . Enter a prompt. For example: “Write a poem about the life of a 6 year old boy” “How-to guide for operating a lawn mower” “Thank you letter after an interview"
